content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be re-framed as recursive self-improving agents themselves, where the memory structure actively selects which new experience traces to retain, rather than passively storing what the parent agent encounters. This turns agent memory from a static component into a curiosity-driven active learning agent in its own right, with its own intrinsic reward for encoding under-explored pattern gaps that the parent agent missed.
